Name: PRIMARY
Description: EPRV Standard FITS HEADER (no data)

Name: INSTRUMENT_HEADER
Description: Inherited NEID instrument header (no data)

Name: RECEIPT
Description: Table of operations that have been performed on this file

Name: DRP_CONFIG
Description: Pipeline details (settings etc) to go from native data to L2

Name: EXT_DESCRIPT
Description: Table describing contents of each extension

Name: ORDER_TABLE
Description: Table capturing the wavelength extent of each echelle order in Trace 1: NEID MODE FIBER1 fiber

Name: TRACE1_FLUX
Description: Flux in Trace 1: NEID MODE FIBER1 fiber

Name: TRACE1_WAVE
Description: Wavelength solution in Trace 1: NEID MODE FIBER1 fiber

Name: TRACE1_VAR
Description: Flux variance in Trace 1: NEID MODE FIBER1 fiber

Name: TRACE1_BLAZE
Description: Blaze in Trace 1: NEID MODE FIBER1 fiber

Name: TRACE2_FLUX
Description: Flux in Trace 2: NEID MODE FIBER2 fiber

Name: TRACE2_WAVE
Description: Wavelength solution in Trace 2: NEID MODE FIBER2 fiber

Name: TRACE2_VAR
Description: Flux variance in Trace 2: NEID MODE FIBER2 fiber

Name: TRACE2_BLAZE
Description: Blaze in Trace 2: NEID MODE FIBER2 fiber

Name: TRACE3_FLUX
Description: Flux in Trace 3: NEID MODE FIBER3 fiber

Name: TRACE3_WAVE
Description: Wavelength solution in Trace 3: NEID MODE FIBER3 fiber

Name: TRACE3_VAR
Description: Flux variance in Trace 3: NEID MODE FIBER3 fiber

Name: TRACE3_BLAZE
Description: Blaze in Trace 3: NEID MODE FIBER3 fiber

Name: BARYCORR_KMS
Description: Barycentric correction velocity per order in km/s

Name: BARYCORR_Z
Description: Barycentric correction velocity per order in redshift (z)

Name: BJD_TDB
Description: Photon weighted midpoint per order as barycentric dynamical time (JD)

Name: TRACE1_DRIFT
Description: Instrument drift velocity relative to start of observing session in km/s

Name: EXPMETER
Description: Chromatic exposure meter for Trace 1: NEID MODE FIBER1 fiber

Name: TRACE1_TELLURIC
Description: Telluric model for Trace 1: NEID MODE FIBER1 fiber (line and continuum absorption combined)
